Operation 'getAccountBalances' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description lacks important context about authentication requirements and specific details about what AccountBalance objects contain. Added clarity about the response structure, authentication requirement, and the types of financial metrics returned to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

data.current_summary: Get account balances for all user accounts
data.current_description: Get balance information for all user accounts as an array of account objects.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account balance information for all accounts
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves balance information for all authenticated user accounts. Returns an array of AccountBalance objects containing cash balance, buying power, margin information, and other account metrics. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks important context about authentication requirements and specific details about what AccountBalance objects contain. Added clarity about the response structure, authentication requirement, and the types of financial metrics returned to help AI agents understand the operation's full scope and when to use it.

message: Operation 'placeOrder' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about input requirements (PlaceOrderRequest schema), output format (PlaceOrderResponse), and important side effects (order is sent to market immediately). Added specifics about what parameters are expected, what is returned, and the immediate market impact to improve AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Submit a new order for stocks or options. Supports single-leg and multi-leg orders.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit a new stock or options order
data.description_suggestion: Submits a new order for stocks or options trading. Accepts PlaceOrderRequest with order details including symbol, quantity, price, order type, and legs for multi-leg strategies. Returns PlaceOrderResponse with order confirmation and order ID. Order is immediately sent to the market upon successful submission. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about input requirements (PlaceOrderRequest schema), output format (PlaceOrderResponse), and important side effects (order is sent to market immediately). Added specifics about what parameters are expected, what is returned, and the immediate market impact to improve AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getCurrentQuote' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_context. Original description mentions what data is returned but lacks clarity about required input parameters and how to specify the security. Added explicit mention of the symbol parameter requirement and clarified that Greeks are specific to options contracts. Also added context about real-time data sourcing to help AI agents understand data freshness and when this operation is appropriate to use.

data.current_summary: Get current quote for a security
data.current_description: Retrieve real-time quote data for a security symbol including bid, ask, last trade, volume, and options Greeks.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve real-time market quote for security
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time quote data for a specified security symbol. Returns Quote object containing bid/ask prices, last trade price, volume, and for options contracts, Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega). Requires the security symbol as a query parameter. Data is updated in real-time from market feeds.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions what data is returned but lacks clarity about required input parameters and how to specify the security. Added explicit mention of the symbol parameter requirement and clarified that Greeks are specific to options contracts. Also added context about real-time data sourcing to help AI agents understand data freshness and when this operation is appropriate to use.
